title: Resume Architecture, Evidence Statements, and Machine-Robust Delivery · Career Evidence Case: Machine Robust
summary: A resume uses decorative columns, keyword blocks, vague adjectives, unsupported impact numbers, and identical content for every role. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the machine robust increment in truthful role-targeted resume system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Produce readable semantic source, plain-text, and appropriately generated PDF variants that survive selection, extraction, links, zoom, and reflow checks.
Translate projects, education, open source, community work, care, career change, and employment into relevant evidence without hiding provenance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Machine Robust · Theory Machine Robust
steps.instruction:
theory case — A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Machine Robust contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Machine Robust · Theory Machine Robust.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for produce readable semantic source, plain-text, and appropriately generated pdf variants that survive selection, extraction, links, zoom, and reflow checks. For Predict Machine Robust · Theory Machine Robust, keep Machine Robust connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Machine Robust condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: EEOC Disability Discrimination and Employment Decisions — Controls U.S.-specific applicant accommodation, confidentiality, pre-offer inquiry, and employment-decision boundaries while requiring local qualified guidance elsewhere.

hints: For Predict Machine Robust · Theory Machine Robust, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Machine Robust precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Machine Robust · Theory Machine Robust, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

For Predict Machine Robust · Theory Machine Robust, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Passing an automated resume scanner guarantees human usability.

options.text: Produce readable semantic source, plain-text, and appropriately generated PDF variants that survive selection, extraction, links, zoom, and reflow checks. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
Passing an automated resume scanner guarantees human usability. That claim fails the predict machine robust evidence boundary for Machine Robust.

For predict machine robust, apply Machine Robust without its stated preconditions, omit the truthful role-targeted resume system trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Machine Robust for truthful role-targeted resume system.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. The worked example variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Produce readable semantic source, plain-text, and appropriately generated PDF variants that survive selection, extraction, links, zoom, and reflow checks. A defensible solution applies Machine Robust, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to truthful role-targeted resume system.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-machine-robust — Produce readable semantic source, plain-text, and appropriately generated PDF variants that survive selection, extraction, links, zoom, and reflow checks.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-3
focus: career-machine-robust
decision-evidence: Produce readable semantic source, plain-text, and appropriately generated PDF variants that survive selection, extraction, links, zoom, and reflow checks.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Passing an automated resume scanner guarantees human usability. This fails the Machine Robust contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: EEOC Disability Discrimination and Employment Decisions (U.S. federal guidance reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls U.S.-specific applicant accommodation, confidentiality, pre-offer inquiry, and employment-decision boundaries while requiring local qualified guidance elsewhere.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Produce readable semantic source, plain-text, and appropriately generated PDF variants that survive selection, extraction, links, zoom, and reflow checks.
